arts.ttl: Manchester United latest as Premier League club to 'hold talks' with striker target, take advantage of Tottenham Hotspur loss
arts.sum: Manchester United will soon learn the fallout of their Europa League final defeat, with reports suggesting that a striker target will hold talks with a domestic rival.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho aims thinly-veiled dig at Ruben Amorim, before agent brother says he was 'thrown under the bus' in spat over Europa League final axe after Tottenham beat Man United
arts.sum: Reacting to his exclusion and Manchester United's defeat, Garnacho's brother and agent Roberto caused a stir by taking to social media to laugh at Amorim's decision to bench him.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur 1-0 Manchester United: Ruben Amorim future latest after Europa League final defeat in Bilbao
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim speaks out on his future at Old Trafford following his side's 1-0 Europa League final defeat against Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: James Maddison aims hilarious dig at Roy Keane in the CBS studio after Tottenham's Europa League triumph following his criticism earlier in the season - but Man United legend gets the final laugh
arts.sum: Maddison was one of a number of injured Spurs stars ruled out of contention in Bilbao, but he was at the San Mames all the same to cheer his side onto victory from the stands.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou speaks honestly on his future as Tottenham boss after guiding his side to Europa League glory over Man United follows dreadful Premier League campaign
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has opened up on his future at Tottenham after guiding them to Europa League glory over Manchester United. His side ended their 17-year trophy drought with a 1-0 victory.

arts.ttl: Key quotes from Ruben Amorim press conference after 1-0 Europa League final loss to Spurs
arts.sum: What areas can you point to for improvement, because I think there’s a genuine argument that the team has gone backwards in the second half of the season, not forwards? I’m a young guy, but I also understand that with the chances we had in the second half, if we managed to score one the game should be different and our press conference should be so much different.

arts.ttl: Tottenham beat Manchester United to land Europa League glory in Bilbao
arts.sum: A first-half goal separated the Premier League pair.

arts.ttl: EIGHT members of Glazer family attend Spurs vs Man Utd Europa League final as VIP list leaked
arts.sum: Manchester United take on Tottenham Hotspur in the final of the Europa League on Wednesday evening, and the Glazer family are out in force in Bilbao for the clash

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Man United: Lineups for Europa League final confirmed as both managers make major calls
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur confirm their starting XIs for Wednesday's Europa League final in Bilbao, Spain.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man United: Confirmed Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Tottenham and Man Utdface off in the Europa League final at San Mames on Wednesday, May 21st, at 20:00 GMT, with the Spurs seeking to end their 17-year wait for silverware. Click here to follow the a...
